acceptance_targets: [chapter_13_award_01] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:79 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:105 contains at least one materially costly ambiguity or false read that Owen has to resolve before he can trust the lens, and the conclusion at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 still arrives clearly. FAIL if each touched mark still yields an immediately legible upgrade followed by a full explanation in the next beat.

[chapter_13_craft_01] PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:123 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127 shows Owen narrowing to chores, timing, or anticipated interruptions instead of stating a neat global ethic, and there is no sentence-function equivalent to 'the planet was the unit at risk.' FAIL if the passage still reads like a composed manifesto rather than evasive close-third thought.

[chapter_13_prose_01] PASS if, across the cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:7, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:25, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:77, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:91, no more than two beats still use the same negation-before-definition setup. FAIL if three or more of those lines remain in substantially the same rhetorical pattern.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:79 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:105 contains at least one materially costly ambiguity or false read that Owen has to resolve before he can trust the lens, and the conclusion at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 still arrives clearly. FAIL if each touched mark still yields an immediately legible upgrade followed by a full explanation in the next beat.
findings.problem: Once the lens activates, the scene climbs by clean diagnostic increments: Owen touches a mark, gets a more legible answer, and immediately derives the chapter's governing thesis. Because the damaged instrument never seriously misleads him or forces a costly interpretive choice, the reveal lands more as information transfer than as fought-for discovery.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the activation sequence around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:65, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:79, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:101 so at least one read is partial, ambiguous, or physically destabilizing enough that Owen must infer through prior table-work rather than instantly translate the display. Keep the state delta, but make the conclusion in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:111 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 feel earned through uncertainty instead of successive button-press escalation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:123 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127 shows Owen narrowing to chores, timing, or anticipated interruptions instead of stating a neat global ethic, and there is no sentence-function equivalent to 'the planet was the unit at risk.' FAIL if the passage still reads like a composed manifesto rather than evasive close-third thought.
findings.problem: Owen's secrecy rationale slips out of his style-bible register and into polished abstract thesis. The lines about the 'human scale' and 'planetary units' give him a clean philosophical defense of his moral narrowing, but his profile says he dodges value judgments by retreating into method, timing, and practical constraint.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the interior argument at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:123, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:125, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:127 so Owen justifies silence through procedural evasions, anticipated arguments, and immediate work requirements rather than an elegant abstract principle. Keep the ugliness of the choice, but let it surface through what he refuses to explain to Prue, Martha, or Neville and what task-list language he hides behind.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across the cited passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:7, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:25, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:77, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:91, no more than two beats still use the same negation-before-definition setup. FAIL if three or more of those lines remain in substantially the same rhetorical pattern.
findings.problem: The chapter leans repeatedly on a negation-before-definition sentence shape ('It was not... It was...' / 'He did not... What changed...'). Used this many times in one scene, the construction stops feeling chosen and starts sounding like a reusable prose template.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:7, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:25, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:63, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:77, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:91. Keep the clarifying pressure, but convert at least several of these beats into direct affirmative description, materially different syntax, or concrete action so the chapter is not repeatedly defining each revelation by first saying what it is not.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
